description:
Overview:
【Winter Fleeced Pantyhose】Our warm fleece-lined pantyhose have three kinds of thicknesses for you to choose. The fleece-lined warm tights are made of skin-friendly material, not harmful to your skin, no deformation, no fading, and no pilling. The fake translucent fleece pantyhose give you lasting warmth in winter, without adding a bulky feeling.
【Fake Translucent Design】The unique translucent design makes it looks fashionable like sheer pantyhose, going with various outfits. Your legs look slender from the outside, at the same time fake translucent nude tights have warm fleece inside, keeping you warm. The stretchy materials allow you to move freely, you can wear it comfortably.
【High Waist Design】The high-waisted design lengthens the curves of your legs to make legs longer and slim visually. Moreover, these fake translucent nude tights can effectively tighten your legs, help control your top tummy, and flattens the lower abdomen to show a slimmer appearance.

【All Matching Warm Fleece Pantyhose】The stylish translucent fleece winter pantyhose with classic colors are suitable for any outfit, you can put on skirts you like in winter, not worrying the cold while showing your charming legs. You will be the focus with charming figures, compared with other women with thick cotton leggings.


Product information:
Material:Polyester Fiber (Polyester)
Style:Europe and America
Colour:Black skin with feet, black skin with feet, coffee with feet, coffee with feet, gray with feet, gray with feet


Size Information:

SizeSuit Weight
80g spring and autumn style40-70kg
80grams plus size60-90kg
220g fleece and thickened40-70kg
220grams plus size60-100kg
300g fleece thickened40-70kg
300g extra large plush60-100kg


Size: 80 grams (spring and autumn models without velvet), 80 grams (plus size spring and autumn models without velvet), 220 grams (plus velvet thickening) [suitable for 80-145 Jin], 220 grams (plus size plus velvet thickening)， 300 grams (plus velvet thickening)

The size is average, 3 kinds thickness ,The middle waist height is 7cm, suitable for height of 155 ~ 175cm and weight of 40 ~ 72.5 kg


Packing list:

Leggings*1
